static_context.name: prior_stroke_or_stroke_family
static_context.notes: Use ICD families I60-I64/G45 and legacy prefixes.

hourly_vitals.name: map_merged
hourly_vitals.normalization_rule: Prefer invasive MAP when available, otherwise non-invasive MAP.

hourly_vitals.name: temperature_c
hourly_vitals.normalization_rule: Convert Fahrenheit readings to Celsius; keep Celsius readings unchanged.

hourly_vitals.name: urine_output_items
hourly_vitals.normalization_rule: Aggregate validated urine-output itemids to hourly totals.

hourly_vitals.name: urineoutput
hourly_vitals.normalization_rule: Hourly aggregate from validated outputevents itemids.

neurologic.name: gcs_total
neurologic.notes: Prefer sum of corrected components unless an independent validated total is selected.
neurologic.normalization_rule: Sum validated GCS eye, verbal, and motor components unless a validated independent total is selected.

neurologic.name: rass
neurologic.normalization_rule: Use validated Richmond Agitation-Sedation Scale itemid 228096.

neurologic.name: delirium_assessment
neurologic.normalization_rule: Map chartevents values to Positive/Negative/UTA flags.

neurologic.name: cam_component_items
neurologic.notes: CAM support only; 228300 is too sparse to serve as primary signal.

neurologic.name: delirium_note_keywords
neurologic.notes: Low frequency; do not use as primary label source.

labs.name: glucose_merged
labs.normalization_rule: Prefer serum glucose; fallback to bedside glucose when serum is missing.

labs.name: troponin_i
labs.notes: No meaningful ICU coverage in v3.1.

labs.name: procalcitonin
labs.notes: No confirmed standard item in MIMIC-IV v3.1.

blood_gas.name: pao2_fio2_ratio
blood_gas.normalization_rule: Use derived PF ratio when available from blood-gas table.

medications.name: vasopressor_dose_norepi_equiv
medications.normalization_rule: Convert agent-specific vasopressor doses to norepinephrine-equivalent burden.

medications.name: fluid_input_hourly
medications.normalization_rule: Aggregate infusion volumes within hour bins.

medications.name: fluid_balance
medications.normalization_rule: Hourly fluid input minus hourly urine output.

pathway_objects.name: stroke_proxy_deterioration_markers
pathway_objects.source: GCS / RASS / vent / restraint / sedation pattern

pathway_objects.name: diagnosis_pathway_events
pathway_objects.source: threshold crossings + procedure time + note mention + derived onset tables
pathway_objects.normalization_rule: Convert diagnosis-related signals into time-stamped pathway events with source/confidence/proxy semantics.

text_objects.name: raw_notes_0_168h
text_objects.normalization_rule: Preserve timestamped note order; no pooling in the mainline representation.

text_objects.name: clean_note_text
text_objects.normalization_rule: Sentence-level clean policy removes heuristic AFTER sentences from note text.

text_objects.name: note_sequence_object
text_objects.source: ordered note list with timestamps and type
text_objects.normalization_rule: Store notes as ordered per-stay sequences with timestamps and note type.
